name: The school of obedience.
description: The school of obedience is a school founded in 1818 by Alfred A. BERGENHEIN. It is the most prestiege and strict schools in Germany and many applicants regret applying. The school has over 156,000 students. ITs campus is a size of 5 football fields with high quality areas. Students from foreign countries often come here to seek new opportunities, where they are  met with strictness and obedience.
